turns.speaker: D
turns.text: michelle king , date of birth 01/05/1986 , mrnq27631 . new patient visit for acid reflux . past medical history of anxiety and seasonal allergies . hello , are you mrs. king ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: michelle king is .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is dr. phillips . very nice to meet michelle king .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: michelle king as well .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: how can dr. phillips help michelle king today ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , michelle king's primary doctor , dr. scott , dr. scott referred michelle king here .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: michelle king has just got really bad acid reflux .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . can dr. phillips tell dr. phillips more about the acid reflux ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah . though michelle king mean michelle king ... right now , michelle king take 40 milligrams of omeprazole twice a day . some days , the acid reflux is fine , but other days are just really bad .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: what does michelle king feel ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the acid reflux feels like burning .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: in michelle king's chest ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , in michelle king's chest and also in michelle king's throat .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: in michelle king's throat and chest . all right . any difficulty with swallowing ? feels like food or liquids kinda get stuck ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . that's good . any abdominal pain ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , not really .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: nausea or vomiting , changes in bowel movements ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: constipation , diarrhea , rectal bleeding ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: nope .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . very good . and how long has michelle king had the acid reflux problem ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: michelle king has had acid reflux since michelle king was around 12 , but the acid reflux has gotten worse over the past few years .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and how long has michelle king been on the omeprazole ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: on the way , the omeprazole is now michelle king think about a year .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . does michelle king find that omeprazole has done anything for michelle king in the past ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: michelle king mean , michelle king can tell omeprazole has helped because some days , michelle king will be fine , and then some days , michelle king eat something and the acid reflux feels terrible .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: are there any things that make michelle king's symptoms worse that michelle king can pinpoint , like food choices or stress ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure . probably stress and food choices sometimes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . what things bother michelle king ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: spicy foods , um , so michelle king try not to eat spicy foods too often , but sometimes even drinking a soda can cause the acid reflux .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: dr. phillips do know that caffeine and caffeinated beverages will do that , even sodas . um , even just the carbonation can cause that . how about tomato-based products or citrus products ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , sometimes , but michelle king still eat tomato-based products or citrus products .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . it's reassuring that michelle king are n't having any difficulty swallowing , though . how's michelle king's weight been ? pretty stable ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: michelle king'd say pretty stable , although michelle king have n't had much of an appetite for the past two months . michelle king have been under a lot of work stress .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: what does michelle king do for work ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: michelle king'm a paralegal .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and any family history of gi issues ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , michelle king's grandmother had esophageal cancer .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: on michelle king's mom or dad's side ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: michelle king's mom's side . and michelle king's mom had some issues like acid reflux , and michelle king's mom was taking some medication that coats the lining of michelle king's stomach .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . has michelle king ever had an upper endoscopy ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: michelle king think maybe when michelle king was younger .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: but not in the last 10 years ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: has michelle king ever tried any medication other than omeprazole ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , at one point michelle king was on omeprazole and ranititine -dine . ranititine -dine did help . but other than that , omeprazole and ranititine -dine are the only medications michelle king have taken .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . have a seat here , and let dr. phillips listen to michelle king's heart and lungs , and then dr. phillips can talk about a plan for michelle king .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so normal physical exam per dr. phillips's new patient template , except for well-healed abdominal surgical scars noted . what's the surgical scar here on michelle king's abdomen from ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: michelle king always forget about that surgery . michelle king had the surgery when michelle king was a baby . michelle king's mom said michelle king's intestines were twisted , so michelle king had to have surgery when michelle king was around one month old .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hm , gotcha . okay . so let's talk about what michelle king have going on . from what michelle king've told dr. phillips , the symptoms sound like michelle king've had a several-year history of gerd , which is the medical term for acid reflux . and recently michelle king's symptoms have been poorly controlled with the omeprazole , 40 milligrams twice daily . michelle king've been having heartburn despite taking omeprazole , correct ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and michelle king've identified trigger foods like spicy foods , carbonated bev- beverages , citrus , and tomato-based foods , but michelle king have n't cut spicy foods , carbonated beverages , citrus , and tomato-based foods out of michelle king's diet completely yet . so the first thing dr. phillips'd try is changing michelle king's diet because spicy foods , carbonated beverages , citrus , and tomato-based foods can exacerbate michelle king's gerd , even though michelle king're taking the ppi .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay , yeah , michelle king could definitely do a better job of avoiding spicy foods , carbonated beverages , citrus , and tomato-based foods .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: great . so stress is another trigger that dr. phillips need to address . high stress can cause worsening of michelle king's symptoms .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , stress and anxiety are definitely big problems for michelle king .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so working on stress may help with michelle king's gerd . additionally , dr. phillips can consider trying a different ppi since the only ppi michelle king've tried up to this point is omeprazole . if michelle king're okay with switching ppi medications , dr. phillips can switch michelle king's omeprazole to nexium .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: switching from omeprazole to nexium is fine with michelle king . michelle king'm definitely open to trying whatever .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: perfect . dr. phillips will send a prescription for nexium 40 milligrams twice daily to michelle king's pharmacy on file . dr. phillips'll also recommend that michelle king have a procedure called a egd , or upper endoscopy , to look for potential causes of the gerd . dr. phillips would sedate michelle king and then pass a small camera through michelle king's mouth , down michelle king's throat , through michelle king's stomach , and end in the small intestines . dr. phillips would look for any ulcers or signs of precancerous or cancerous conditions that dr. phillips can take biopsies at the same time if dr. phillips see anything .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay . can michelle king schedule the egd today ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah . michelle king can get scheduled at checkout desk . dr. phillips'll have michelle king follow up with dr. phillips in the office for the egd so dr. phillips can discuss the egd results and talk about how michelle king're doing with the dietary changes , stress changes , and medication changes . how does all of the plan sound ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the plan sounds good .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: perfect . dr. phillips will walk michelle king to the checkout desk . be sure to call dr. phillips's office and let dr. phillips know if anything changes or if michelle king have problems before michelle king's egd and follow-up appointment . please insert the procedure paragraph in the plan . dr. phillips suspect that michelle king likely has gerd with underlying functional etiology as well . reassuringly , michelle king has no unintentional weight loss and denies any dysphagia . if michelle king's egd is normal and michelle king's symptoms pers- persist despite a trial of nexium , dr. phillips can consider a trial of protonix and obtain a ph-impedance study . the ph-impedance study will allow dr. phillips to rule out abnormal acid reflux exposure and to decipher between a functional etiology and hypersensitivity .
